title: abtv Better Leaves addon
description: aBTV leaves addon changes all leaf types in the game and give the game more life.
body:
aBTV leaves addon changes all leaf types in the game and give the game more life.

 

It changes the look for the following blocks:

 

- Birch leaves

- Acacia leaves

- Oak leaves

- Dark Oak leaves

- Jungle leaves

- Spruce leaves

- Mangrove leaves

- Azaelea leaves

- Flowering Azalea leaves

 

bring more life to gardens, lush forests, better overgrown caves and more
